to support our positive outlook for

Benchmark csi300 index increased 9%
today the most since 2008 assuming gains
holding us trading the fxi ETF will have
appreciated 30% since our discretionary
risk management overlay AKA Dr Mo
pivoted 42 mcro clients into a long Max
position in China two weeks ago we will
not bet against beijing's ability to
engineer a transitory bounce in Chinese
growth in the short to medium term early
evidence via the official composite PMI
reading for September is supportive of
that view that implies investors may be
forced to incrementally cover shorts and
Global cyclical into and perhaps through
a year end we expect to continue
observing evidence of central banks
around the world prioritizing Financial
stability over price stability as
evidenced by most major central banks
easing monetary policy amid above Target
core inflation actions that will likely
extend their respective business cycles
that is not a dynamic you should fight
as an investor make money instead

bullish from the perspective of our

overlay continues to maintain a long Max

know a year now um so investors if

know guide your asset allocation and
portfol construction you have benefited
tremendously on the long side of gold
over the past a year or so uh in terms
of what's been driving that move in gold
in our view we've obviously seen a
significant amount of central banks
buying which kind of makes a lot of
sense because going back to what I said
in the executive summary central banks
are are essentially prioritizing
Financial stability over price stability
which means we're likely to experience
more monetary debasement currently and
in the months ahead and if the central
Bankers are aware that they're going to
perpetuate more monetary Dev basement
then they're getting out in front of
that by buying gold so it's ironically
it's ironic and perverse but you know
that they're the cause of the their own
um their own uh worries but it is what
it is because you know we just have to
